issues.description: FlipLife action is incorrect. Card text says 'add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand' — this is a DrawCard action (drawing from Life pile), not FlipLife (which converts Life to Don). Should be DrawCard with source:'Life' and count:1.

Action sequencing error: FlipLife should not precede PlayFromHand. The correct sequence is: DrawCard (conditional), then PlayFromHand (conditional on having valid target). Current DSL implies both actions always execute.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] You may add 1 card from the top or bottom of your Life cards to your hand: Play up to 1 yellow {Land of Wano} type Character card with a cost of 4 or less from your hand.
